title: One Mine Piece - SMP Server
description: Official modpack for One Mine Piece SMP Server
body:
☠️🌊 ONE PIECE SMP 🌊☠️
A true SMP inspired by the world of One Piece.
The Minecraft world has been rebuilt to match One Piece lore: separated oceans, the Red Line, conquerable islands, crews, wars, and hardcore survival.

🌍 One Piece World
🌊 World divided into the 4 Blues
🟥 Separated by the Red Line and Calm Belts
🏔️ Reverse Mountain at (0,0) as the entrance to the Grand Line
🏴‍☠️ Island and ocean exploration system
🏝️ Island System
Players spawn on safe islands within the 4 oceans
You gain loyalty by:
living on the island
building
breaking/placing blocks
killing mobs and players
👑 The player with the highest loyalty becomes the island ruler:

protects houses and chests
controls the territory
creates bases and kingdoms
⚔️ Other players can surpass your loyalty and take your island.
Island control updates every 2 hours.

🟥 Red Line & Mariejois
🧿 Only powerful haki users can climb the Red Line.

The strongest players may:

found Mariejois
rule above the world
dominate the seas
☠️ Hardcore Survival
❌ No:

TP
/spawn
warps
shops
automatic economy
💀 Everything must be earned:

navigation
resources
alliances
territory
reputation
No money system.
The economy is fully player-driven.

⚓ SERVER IP
151.243.218.20:25665

🏴‍☠️ Build your crew. Conquer islands. Rule the seas.
